title: Reference compliance modules for demo only (not legal advice)
disclaimer: Synthetic snippets for RAG retrieval in this POC. Always verify with qualified UAE counsel.

chunks.text: Virtual asset activities involving issuance or facilitation of tokens may require alignment with applicable UAE virtual asset regulatory frameworks. Token classification (utility vs security-like) affects licensing path. This POC does not determine classification.

Marketing of virtual assets to UAE persons may trigger disclosure, fit-and-proper, and custody requirements depending on activity type. Human legal review is required before any client-facing materials.
ADGM frameworks for digital securities and tokenized assets emphasize clear investor disclosure, custody arrangements, and transfer restriction enforcement on-chain or via regulated intermediaries.

Personal data of investors (KYC documents, contact details) should be processed with defined residency, retention, and access controls. Prefer on-prem redaction before sending text to external model APIs.
ERC-3643 (T-REX) and ERC-1400 family standards support permissioned security tokens with transfer rules, document management, and compliance hooks. Implementation requires audited smart contracts.
